Atty. THOMAS TROST, Esq. of Sproul Trost LLP (Tel: 916-783-6262) for Plaintiff Walker Telecomm, Inc.
Atty. ANDREW DOSA, Esq. of Law Offices of Andrew Dosa (Tel: 510-865-1600) for Defendant McKee and Company Electric.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WALKER TELECOMM, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Litigation Pending Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Walker Telecomm, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. (See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.
